About Boardman Roofing

Let Boardman Roofing take the stress out of your roofing project

Are you in need of a roofing expert and don't know where to look? We know that choosing a roofing company to work on your home or business can be both time consuming and stressful. Rest assured, by choosing Boardman Roofing you're getting a company with vast experience in the trade and an abundance of satisfied customers.

We're ready when you are!

We provide an expert roofing service tailored to your needs. We're experts in our field and can handle any roofing related task — overseeing your project from start to completion, and to an exceptional standard.

Get in touch with us →

Industry experience

How do we uphold our excellent reputation?

Request a quotation →
01.

By maintaining our excellent standard of workmanship

We take great pride in everything we put our name to, and this is evident in the final product.

02.

By being punctual, efficient and great value

We're well known for being reliable and great value for money — don't believe us? See our reviews.

03.

By putting you, our customer, first… at all times

We put the customer first in everything we do, regardless of the size or complexity of the job.

Our Services

A wide range of roofing services

We're renowned in Manchester for our quality roofing work, excellent customer care and being great value for money. We cover everything from new roofs to soffits & gutters.

🏠

New Roofs

Complete re-roofs built to last, project managed from start to completion to an exceptional standard.

🔧

Roof Repairs

Fast, reliable repairs to keep your roof — your home's first line of defence — watertight and secure.

📐

Flat Roofs

Durable flat roofing solutions for extensions, garages and outbuildings, fitted with care.

🪟

Fascias

Quality fascia installation and replacement that protects and finishes your roofline beautifully.

🌧️

Soffits & Gutters

Soffit, guttering and downpipe installation and maintenance to manage water away from your home.

✅

Any Roofing Task

We're experts in our field and can handle any roofing related task — just ask, we're happy to help.
